title: xanthophyllum ngii
intro: Xanthophyllum ngii, also known as the Ngii tree or Yellow Wood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum ngii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infections. Traditionally, Xanthophyllum ngii is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in the form of a poultice or ointment to apply topically to affected areas.
